scripts.dev: node ./scripts/workspace-build.mjs build && SPACESKIT_PORT=${SPACESKIT_PORT:-9320} SPACESKIT_GATEWAY_PROFILE=${SPACESKIT_GATEWAY_PROFILE:-embedded} SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID=${SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID:-resource:main} bun run packages/bootstrap/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:embedded: node ./scripts/workspace-build.mjs build && SPACESKIT_PORT=${SPACESKIT_PORT:-9320} SPACESKIT_GATEWAY_PROFILE=${SPACESKIT_GATEWAY_PROFILE:-embedded} SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID=${SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID:-resource:main} bun run packages/bootstrap/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:external: node ./scripts/workspace-build.mjs build && SPACESKIT_PORT=${SPACESKIT_PORT:-9321} SPACESKIT_GATEWAY_PROFILE=external SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID=${SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID:-resource:external} bun run packages/bootstrap/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:external:strict:example: node ./scripts/workspace-build.mjs build && SPACESKIT_SANDBOX_RUNTIME_MODULE=${SPACESKIT_SANDBOX_RUNTIME_MODULE:-./docs/examples/sandbox-runtime-module.mjs} SPACESKIT_PORT=${SPACESKIT_PORT:-9321} SPACESKIT_GATEWAY_PROFILE=external SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID=${SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID:-resource:external} bun run packages/bootstrap/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:external:local: node ./scripts/workspace-build.mjs build && SPACESKIT_ARCH_FREEZE_ENFORCED=false SPACESKIT_PORT=${SPACESKIT_PORT:-9321} SPACESKIT_GATEWAY_PROFILE=external SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID=${SPACESKIT_MAIN_RESOURCE_ID:-resource:external} bun run packages/bootstrap/src/index.ts
scripts.contract-gate: sh -c 'cd ../proto && buf generate && cd ../gateway && git diff --exit-code -- packages/contracts/src/generated'
